chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1458 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocates for petitioner Agha Athar Hussain, Additional Advocate General ************** Mr. Waqas Ali Soomro, Advocate, has filed a vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.7, District Council Sukkur, along with an authority letter; the same are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner’s case is pending before the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) and that the requisite challan has been duly paid; however, despite this, no sincere efforts have been made. Mr. Niazuddin Memon, Advocate, representing respondent SBCA Sukkur, is present and undertakes that respondents SBCA Sukkur, will complete the process within shortest possible time. In view of this statement, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the present petition. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of, with directions to respondents SBCA Sukkur to expedite the process and finalized it within one month. However, until such compliance, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
